properties.name: ai.openai.api-key
properties.description: OpenAI API key for link summary generation.

properties.name: ai.openai.model
properties.description: OpenAI model used for link summary generation.

properties.name: ai.openai.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum tokens for OpenAI summary responses.

properties.name: search.enabled
properties.description: Whether server-side Elasticsearch search is enabled.

properties.name: search.index-name
properties.description: Elasticsearch index name for integrated MemoryMe search.

properties.name: search.initialize-index
properties.description: Whether the application should create the Elasticsearch index on startup when search is enabled.
